name: Yang Jian

skills.name: Mind Games
skills.description: Yang Jian's Resistance increases for each nearby enemy hero.

skills.name: Unleash the Hound
skills.description: Yang Jian commands a Heaven Hound to dash in the target direction, marking and dealing damage to the first enemy hit. Upon using again, Yang Jian dashes to the marked enemy and deals damage to them.

skills.name: Vain Disillusionment
skills.description: Yang Jian deals damage to enemies in front of him and stuns them while reducing their Movement Speed. if an enemy is hit, his Basic Attack is enhanced to deal extra damage.

skills.name: Sight of Origin
skills.description: Yang Jian unleashes a beam of light in the target direction, dealing damage and recovering Health.

tips: Yang Jian (Warrior): Tier B on international ranked — 50.65% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment.

faqs.question: Is Yang Jian good in current season?
faqs.answer: Yang Jian is Tier B Warrior with 50.65% win rate, 0.41% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Yang Jian build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Relentless Blade, Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Rapacious Bite, Nettle Gauntlet, Cuirass of Savagery. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.answer: Strong picks into Yang Jian: Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Yang Jian is strong into Diaochan, Luna, Dr Bian.
